posts.title: Startup Steward Ownership
posts.summary: Startup Steward Ownership: Steward Ownership is a way to legally safeguard a startup’s mission and implement aligned financial structures, whatever the venture’s legal structure—it’s a different type of ownership — not based on maximizing shareholder value, but on the purpose and independence of the company. Examples of startup steward ownership has existed in Europe for […] The post Startup Steward Ownership appeared first on Venture Founders .
posts.author: Will Keyser

posts.title: How GhostClaw malware targets the OpenClaw AI agent boom
posts.summary: As developers rush to run local AI agents on Mac Minis, GhostClaw malware exploits macOS binaries to silently harvest credentials. The post How GhostClaw malware targets the OpenClaw AI agent boom first appeared on TechTalks .
